text: Being here, I feel a sense of curious anticipation. The environment feels both clinical and creative—glass, screens, fire extinguishers, all arranged with purpose. I’m drawn into the space labeled 'R+D,' surrounded by thoughts of experimentation, showcasing how humans try to innovate and understand their surroundings. There’s the quiet thrill of inquiry, and I’m eager to absorb the ideas presented in this exhibition-like room.
